title: Valavan Manohararajah
text: Home * People * Valavan Manohararajah Valavan Manohararajah [1] Valavan Manohararajah , a Sri Lanka born, Canadian computer scientist with M.Sc. and Ph.D. degrees from University of Toronto , both under under supervision of Zvonko Vranesic . His research interests include FPGA , placement and routing for FPGAs, high level synthesis and logic synthesis for FPGAs, and abstract games. Concerning computer chess, Valavan Manohararajah is author of the chess program Rajah , as RajahX also subject of his 2001 M.Sc. thesis on parallel alpha-beta search [2] .
